---
name: New Tool Proposal
about: Propose adding a new financial query or write tool to TallyMCP
title: '[TOOL-PROPOSAL] '
labels: new-tool
assignees: ''

---

**Tool Name**
Suggest a clean name using snake_case (e.g. `get_outstanding_receivables`, `get_day_book`).

**Problem/Use Case**
Describe how a business user, accountant, or developer would use this tool in a chat interface. What natural language questions will this answer?

**TDL & XML Logic (If known)**
Provide the Tally XML structure, Collection type, or TDL fields needed to retrieve this data if you have compiled them.

**Input Parameter Schema**
List the parameters the AI model should provide to this tool (e.g. date range, ledger name, filter criteria) along with brief descriptions.

**Output Format**
Describe how the tool should return the results to the AI (e.g., Markdown table, text summary, list).
